name: Gold_L3VPN_ConfigProfile
description: Thresholds to use for Gold L3VPN services

CPU_THRESHOLD_MAX.description: Threshold for acceptable CPU usage on the device.

MEMFREE_THRESHOLD_MIN.description: Threshold for minimum free memory to be available on the device.

MEMFREE_THRESHOLD_MIN_JUNIPER.description: Threshold for minimum free memory to be available on the device.

PROBE_DELAY_THRESHOLD.description: High Threshold for probe reported latency health checks

PROBE_LOSS_THRESHOLD.description: Threshold for acceptable packet loss rate

PROBE_VARIANCE_THRESHOLD.description: High Threshold for probe reported variance health checks

SRPM_DELAY_THRESHOLD.description: High Threshold for SR-PM latency health checks

SRPM_PACKET_LOSS_THRESHOLD.description: Threshold acceptable for SR-PM packet loss

SRPM_VARIANCE_THRESHOLD.description: High Threshold for SR-PM variance health checks

VPN_INTF_PKT_DISCARDS_THRESHOLD.description: Acceptable delta of in(or out) packet discards expected between polling intervals

VPN_INTF_PKT_ERROR_THRESHOLD.description: Acceptable delta of in(or out) packet errors expected between polling intervals
